title: Cuban Link Classic Ring
material: Solid .925 Sterling Silver (oxidized + polished finish, hallmarked LA)
description: Refined domed band with a recessed Cuban braid channel, polished exterior edges, and oxidized depth for timeless contrast. Hand-cast and finished in Del Rio, Texas.
